name: Garlic Skewered Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chopped fresh basil or 1 1/2 tsp dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Toss the shrimp with the marinade, ensuring they are well coated.
4. Refrigerate for 30 minutes to an hour, tossing occasionally.
5. Remove the shrimp from the marinade, reserving it for brushing onto the shrimp later.
6. Skewer each shrimp by bending it almost in half so that the large end almost touches the smaller end, then insert a skewer just above the tail, passing through the body twice.
7. Grill the shrimp 4-6 inches from the coals for 6-8 minutes, turning frequently and brushing with the reserved marinade two or three times during cooking.
Source: Williams-Sonoma
